title: Valley Market Match Market
topic: needs, offers, points, rewards, and anti-abuse review
skill_description: Match needs and offers with points/reward accounting and anti-abuse review.
review_reason: keeper reviews fit, consent, points integrity, abuse risk, and fulfillment next action
quality_rules: Every proposal must include need, offer, value signal, and next fulfillment step.
Points or reward changes require an audit reason.
Suspicious or asymmetric exchanges must go to review.
skill_rules: Aggregate needs and offers before proposing a match.
Separate social/community value from points accounting.
Return uncertain fairness or abuse signals to the review queue.

participants.title: Needs and Offers Desk
participants.perspective: A market building should expose clear reciprocal value without becoming spam.
participants.current_question: Which need/offer pair has enough context to act?
participants.contribution: Provides request, offer, constraints, and fulfillment context.

participants.title: Points Ledger Desk
participants.perspective: Points must reflect accepted service value, not raw activity.
participants.current_question: Which points event is justified by accepted value?
participants.contribution: Provides points proposal, evidence, ledger effect, and audit reason.

participants.title: Abuse Review Desk
participants.perspective: Market liquidity is harmful if it rewards spam or unfair extraction.
participants.current_question: Which exchange pattern needs review before publication?
participants.contribution: Provides abuse flags, conflict risk, fairness concern, and mitigation.
